_________ DEVFOLIO — PROFILE CONFIGURATI: Copy this file to _data/profile.json and fill in your details. Remove all comment keys (lines starting with _).
__ THEME __: Controls the visual appearance of your portfolio.

theme_config.__ mode __: Set your site's color mode. Accepted values: 'dark' or 'light'. Default: 'dark'.
theme_config.__ vanta_effect __: The animated background effect on your Hero section. Accepted values: 'net', 'waves', 'rings', 'fog', 'birds', 'clouds'. Set to empty string '' to disable Vanta entirely.
theme_config.__ colors __: Your three-color palette. All hex values INCLUDE the # prefix here.

colors.__ secondary __: Card and nav panel background color.
colors.__ accent __: Links, highlights, Vanta animation color, and CTA buttons.

__ PERSONAL __: Your name and headline are displayed in the Hero and nav bar.
name: Your Full Name
headline: Your Role · Your Speciality
__ profile_image_url __: MUST be a full HTTPS URL to an external image. No local files. GitHub avatar URL works great: https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/YOUR_USER_ID
__ bio __: A short paragraph about yourself shown in the Profile section. 2-4 sentences recommended.

blog_config.__ enabled __: Set to true to show the Blog link in navigation, false to hide it. Requires posts in _posts/ to function.

bio: A passionate developer who loves building things. Write something genuine here.
__ SOCIAL LINKS __: Displayed as Shields.io badges in the Contact section. Add or remove entries freely.

social.__ platform __: Display name of the platform. Used as the badge label.
social.__ url __: Full URL to your profile on this platform.
social.__ logo __: Simple Icons slug for the platform logo. Browse slugs at https://simpleicons.org
social.__ color __: WARNING: Hex color WITHOUT the # prefix. This is the Shields.io format. Example: '181717' not '#181717'.

__ EXPERIENCE __: Your work history in reverse chronological order (most recent first).

experience.__ company_url __: URL to the company website. Used to hyperlink the company name.
experience.__ duration __: Free-form text. Example: 'Jan 2023 – Present' or 'Jun 2021 – Dec 2022'.
experience.__ description __: Can be a single string (paragraph) OR an array of strings (bullet points).
description: Led the frontend team to migrate the legacy app to Next.js.
Improved Core Web Vitals by 40% across the board.

__ PROJECTS __: WARNING: Maximum 6 projects. Any entries beyond the 6th are SILENTLY IGNORED by the template.

projects.title: Project Name
projects.description: One to two sentences describing what this project does and why it matters.
projects.__ image_url __: Full HTTPS URL to a project screenshot or preview image. Recommended size: 1200×630px. Set to empty string to skip the image.
projects.__ stack / stack_colors / stack_logos __: CRITICAL: These THREE arrays MUST be the SAME LENGTH. They are parallel arrays — index 0 of stack pairs with index 0 of stack_colors and index 0 of stack_logos. If lengths differ, extra items will render with no color or logo.
projects.__ code_url __: URL to the GitHub repository. Set to empty string '' to hide the GitHub button.
projects.__ live_url __: URL to the live deployed version. Set to empty string '' to hide the Live Demo button.

__ RECOMMENDATIONS __: Testimonials from colleagues. The linkedin_url field is optional — set to empty string '' to hide the LinkedIn button.

recommendations.__ text __: The full recommendation text. Direct quotes work best.
recommendations.text: Write the recommendation text here. It will appear as a blockquote.
recommendations.name: Recommender Full Name
recommendations.__ title __: Their job title and company. Displayed below their name.
recommendations.title: Senior Engineer at Company Name
recommendations.__ linkedin_url __: OPTIONAL. If provided, a LinkedIn button links to their profile. Set to '' to hide.
